rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
Verification machinery needs a smoke-test before being trusted.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Resolved in current file. Prior finding: line:18-19: 'Module 6 consumes `judges/groundedness-judge.md` from Module 5' — the module opens by consuming verification machinery (the judge file), but no smoke-test step is present in the module to confirm the judge fires before the loop starts.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block.
Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path.
Chain prompts by back-reference and deterministic path.
Markdown shout inside fenced prompt blocks is dead weight.
Artifact destinations are explicit subpaths, never naked filenames (Agents 101-specific).
